flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central New Mexico Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.7k → $2.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central New Mexico Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central New Mexico Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
